system.descriptor: Inquiry is the skill of extracting information from people through questioning, investigation, and social pressure.
system.uses:
Uses: Interrogating suspects, canvassing an area for information, researching a topic through contacts, extracting confessions.
Special Use: Inquiry takes time — typically 1d5 hours to canvass an area or question contacts. The GM may modify the time and difficulty based on how obscure the information is and the character's approach.

description.value: Inquiry is the skill of extracting information from people through questioning, investigation, and social pressure.
